title: Duck Tagine with Creamy Sauce
description: A rich and flavorful North African-inspired dish featuring tender duck and a creamy sauce. Serve over couscous for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt, pepper, and tagine spice blend.
Heat the olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck breast until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the duck from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced tomatoes, chicken broth, and heavy cream to the pot.
Return the duck breast to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise for 20-25 minutes, or until the duck is cooked through.
Serve the duck and sauce over couscous, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
